titleStmt.title: SII 20.384: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 384. (B.K. No. 47 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Fragment of a broken slab lying near the Dharmanta's house near the Sōmēśvara temple.

summary.p: Only the concluding portion of the record is preserved. It seems to record the gift of a picotta. It refers to the boundaries of Lakśhumaṇēśvara written at the instance of Mallika[Nā]datta-Vaḍeya, and to a gift to Liṁgaṇagauḍa son of Sōmaṇagauḍa, of Huligere. In characters of about the 15th Century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yahyaṁttu
yināma cāvara 1 ke hu
yanu sarvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi koṭṭu yideU
tra naḍeyabēku . muṁdhe musulumānarāgali brā(ṁ)hma
yī dhar(ṁ)mavanu naḍisi dhar(ṁ)mavanu tekoḷabēku . yī dhar(ṁ)mavanu Ā
musulumānarādare Ātā holeya mādiga turukanallā brā(ṁ)hmaṇa nādare vāraṇā sili gōhatya The letter ṇa is written above the line.
māḍida pātakake hōharu . sudraru sivabhaktaru jayinaru kurubaru bēḍaru muṣṭi garu
da Āva jāttige taṁma taṁdetāyi koṁda pātakake hōharu yī dhar(ṁ)mavanu ma ragaḷu hūu
pala muṁttāda dhar(ṁ)mavanu Aḷivade yī dhar(ṁ)mavanu naḍasidavarige bahu pu(ṁ)ṇya vāgali Eṁdhu
hākida barā dā bhāvi dhar(ṁ)mayyātada silāsāsanada barahake śubhamastu maṁgaḷa ma
ha śrī śrī śrī lakṣumaṇēśvarada sīme sarasamatu mallika nādāttavaḍeyara
nirūpadiṁdha baradātta sīme sēnabōva barahā yīrayayya
ttada yināmavanu huligeṟeya sōmaṇagauḍana maga liṁgaṇagauḍage mattu sarvvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi suṁkada
bā sarvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi koṭu yidevu boṭṭūra sīme hūviṁda paḍuvalu mā(ṁ)nya
Digital edition of SII 20.384 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
